CheckTitle: Check if E2E Networks nodes have compliance mode enabled
Description: This check verifies that E2E Networks nodes run with compliance mode enabled so required security controls are enforced and workload activity remains auditable.
Risk: Nodes without compliance mode enabled may not enforce required security controls, increasing misconfiguration risk and weakening auditability of compute workloads.

Recommendation.Text: Enable compliance mode on nodes to enforce required security controls and maintain auditability.
